title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises:
Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises!
